zh.lifeSummary: 當Mirabelle Garneys於1493年出生在英國素福爾可簡頓時，她的父親John Garneys38歲，母親Elizabeth Frances Sulyard38歲。她於1520年與Edmund Poley在英國英格蘭素福爾可簡頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1552年2月25日在英國素福爾可巴德利享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mirabelle Garneys于1493年出生在英国素福爾可簡頓时，她的父亲John Garneys38岁，母亲Elizabeth Frances Sulyard38岁。她于1520年与Edmund Poley在英国英格兰素福爾可簡頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1552年2月25日在英国素福爾可巴德利享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可巴德利。

nameMeanings.name: Garneys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Garnish
meanings: English: (i) nickname from an unrecorded Old French * garnois, * garneis of uncertain meaning. An adjective related to Old French gernun ‘moustache’ ( see Garnon ) is unlikely in view of the -a- in the Middle English forms. (ii) see Garnes .

nameMeanings.name: Mirabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: , from Latin mirabilis ‘wondrous, lovely’ (a derivative of mirari ‘to wonder at, admire’ compare Miranda ). This name is found in Italian in the form Mirabella . Both the French and Italian forms were quite common in the later Middle Ages. The form Mirabel is found occasionally in France and England as a boy's name. By the 16th century, both forms were rare.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Mirabelle Garneys was born in 1493, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, her father, John Garneys, was 38 and her mother, Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, was 38. She married Edmund Poley in 1520, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 25 February 1552, in Badley, Suffolk, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Badley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mirabelle Garneys est née en 1493, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Garneys, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Poley en 1520, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 février 1552, à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Badley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mirabelle Garneysが1493年にイギリススフォルクケントンで生まれた時，父John Garneysは38歳，母Elizabeth Frances Sulyardは38歳であった。1520年にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントンでEdmund Poleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1552年2月25日にイギリススフォルクバドリーで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクバドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: 영국 수폴크 켄턴 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mirabelle Garneys(이)가 1493년 영국 수폴크 켄턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Garneys(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Frances Sulyard(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄턴에서 Edmund Poley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1552년 2월 25일 영국 수폴크 바들리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 바들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mirabelle Garneys nasceu em 1493, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Garneys, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Poley em 1520, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1552, em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints' Church, Kenton, Suffolk, Eng: алл сеинц' чурч, кэнтон, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mirabelle Garneys родилась в 1493 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Garneys было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Frances Sulyard, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Poley в 1520 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 25 февраля 1552 г. в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности бадли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Edmund Poley en 1520, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1552, en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Badley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
